campaigns.name: Pebble Time
campaigns.what_worked: Existing community, spec upgrade, brand loyalty

campaigns.name: Pebble Time 2
campaigns.hook: The smartwatch you've been waiting for
campaigns.failure_reason: Company acquired by Fitbit before shipping — backers left empty-handed

campaigns.name: Super Troopers 2
campaigns.what_worked: Deep fan nostalgia, Broken Lizard comedy brand

campaigns.name: The Original Salvador Dali Tarot
campaigns.hook: Dali's complete tarot deck, finally published
campaigns.storytelling_arc: Art discovery — 'this masterpiece was hidden for decades'

campaigns.name: Briiv Air Purifier
campaigns.hook: The world's most sustainable air purifier
campaigns.storytelling_arc: Eco-innovation — 'made from moss, powered by nature'
campaigns.what_worked: Unique material (moss), beautiful design, sustainability story

campaigns.name: Scribit
campaigns.hook: A robot that draws anything on your wall
campaigns.what_worked: Amazing video demo, clear 'wow' factor, design credentials

campaigns.name: Nat Geo Crystal LED
campaigns.what_worked: Visual appeal, Nat Geo brand licensing, premium feel

campaigns.name: Joto Whiteboard Robot
campaigns.hook: A drawing robot for your whiteboard
campaigns.what_worked: Clear demo video, unique value prop, office appeal

campaigns.name: Ringly Smart Ring
campaigns.hook: A smart ring that's actually jewelry
campaigns.storytelling_arc: Fashion-first — 'wearable tech that doesn't look like tech'
campaigns.what_worked: Design approach (jewelry first, tech second), fashion influencers

campaigns.name: COTA - The Safe
campaigns.hook: The safest portable safe in the world
campaigns.what_worked: Clear problem, compelling demo, proven technology

campaigns.name: Ztylus Revolver Lens System
campaigns.hook: 4 lenses in one for your smartphone
campaigns.what_worked: Clear problem (swapping lenses), great product shots

campaigns.name: Bento Stack
campaigns.hook: The last charging station you'll ever buy
campaigns.what_worked: Universal problem, beautiful design, Apple aesthetic

campaigns.name: Mosaic Tile Puzzle
campaigns.hook: The most beautiful puzzle you'll never take apart
campaigns.what_worked: Unique concept (keep as art), beautiful visuals

campaigns.name: Aeropress Go
campaigns.hook: The travel companion for coffee lovers
campaigns.what_worked: Existing Aeropress community, clear need, loyal fanbase

campaigns.name: Gravity Blanket
campaigns.hook: The weighted blanket that helps you sleep
campaigns.storytelling_arc: Sleep revolution — 'the science of deep sleep'
campaigns.what_worked: Strong science narrative, clear benefit, influencer marketing

campaigns.name: Luna Display
campaigns.hook: Turn your iPad into a wireless second display
campaigns.storytelling_arc: Productivity hack — 'use your iPad as a real monitor'
campaigns.what_worked: Clear use case, Apple ecosystem, solves real pain

campaigns.name: Scribble Pen
campaigns.hook: Draw with real paint — digitized instantly
campaigns.failure_reason: Technology didn't work as promised — color matching was poor, pen never shipped properly

campaigns.name: Triton Artificial Gill
campaigns.failure_reason: Physically impossible — no prototype, vaporware from start, Kickstarter eventually pulled campaign

campaigns.name: Kreyos Smartwatch
campaigns.what_worked: Voice control angle, early smartwatch hype
campaigns.failure_reason: Voice recognition didn't work, battery terrible, shipped incomplete product to angry backers

campaigns.name: Healbe GoBe
campaigns.hook: The first wearable that tracks calorie intake automatically
campaigns.storytelling_arc: Health revolution — 'know what you eat without logging'
campaigns.failure_reason: Technology was pseudoscience — impedance couldn't measure calories. FDA investigated. Backers furious.

campaigns.name: iBackPack
campaigns.failure_reason: Too many features = too many failure points. Battery safety issues, delayed 2+ years, shippped incomplete

campaigns.name: Pyramid America Selfie
campaigns.hook: The selfie drone that fits in your pocket
campaigns.failure_reason: $23K of $50K goal — weak marketing, no differentiation, no audience

campaigns.name: Nabi Music System
campaigns.failure_reason: $14K of $100K — crowded market (Sonos, Echo), no differentiation, poor video

campaigns.name: WoknBok
campaigns.hook: The ultimate wok for home cooks
campaigns.failure_reason: $8K of $25K — small niche, no marketing, weak value prop vs existing woks

campaigns.name: Arco Smart Desklamp
campaigns.hook: The smartest desk lamp ever designed
campaigns.what_worked: German design reputation, clear smart features (wireless charging built in)

campaigns.name: Kanketsu Sushi Knife
campaigns.storytelling_arc: Craftsmanship — '1000 years of tradition meets modern steel'
campaigns.what_worked: Authenticity, Japanese craftsmanship story, high-quality video

campaigns.what_worked: Teenage Engineering brand, incredible product design, music community

campaigns.name: CandyLab Sugar Printer
